title: Regolamenti dwar l-Iżbark ta' l-Annimali
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/10.27/mlt, expression eli/sl/10.27/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 8 ta’ l-1963
provisions.content: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar lI\bark ta’ Annimali.

provisions.title: It-titolu ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti hu Regolamenti dwar lI\bark ta’ Annimali
provisions.content:
F’dawn ir-Regolamenti, kemm-il-darba r-rabta tal-kliem
ma tfisserx xort’o]ra -

Titolu.
Tifsir.

"annimal" tfisser \iemel, ]mar, bag]al, gendus jew baqra;
"baqra" tinkludi g]o[la tqila;

"ti\barka" tfisser ti\barka minn bastiment li fuqu jin[arru
annimali bil-ba]ar g]al port jew post ie]or f’dawn il-G\ejjer.

provisions.title: Tifsir
provisions.content:
Kull min ji\barka jew i[ieg]el li ji[u \barkati annimali
ming]ajr ma ji[u osservati almenu dawn ir-Regolamenti dwar li\bark, ikun ]ati ta’ reat.

provisions.title: Tifsir
provisions.content:
(1) |wiemel, ]mir, bg]ula u gniedes g]andhom ji[u
\barkati permezz ta’ `ineg protetti b’dak il-materjal li, fil-fehma
tal-Veterinarju Prin`ipali tal-Gvern, jevita irritazzjoni.

Reati.

|bark ta’ \wiemel,
]mir, bg]ula u
gniedes.

(2) |wiemel, ]mir u bg]ula g]andhom ji[u \barkati wie]ed
wie]ed.
(3)

Gniedes jistg]u ji[u \barkati tnejn tnejn.

provisions.title: Reati
provisions.content: Kull baqra g]andha ti[i \barkata f’kaxxa li tista’ tin[arr.

provisions.title: Reati
provisions.content:
Jekk xi annimal ikollu xi sieq miksura jew ikun xort’o]ra
mwe[[a’ serjament jew ikun fi stat salva[[ li ma jkunx jista’ ji[i
\barkat skond id-disposizzjonijiet ta’ dawn ir-Regolamenti, ilpersuna inkarigata mill-i\bark g]andha minnufih tg]arraf lil
veterinarju tal-gvern, u l-annimal g]andu wara dan ji[i \barkat jew
maqtul skond dawk id-direttivi li jistg]u jing]ataw minn dak ilveterinarju tal-gvern.

|bark ta’ baqar.
Annimali mwe[[a’
jew selva[[i.
